text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. We're excited to have you on the team. Feel free to reach out if you need anything!
Welcome to the community, guide_sam! You've been approved as an event helper. Looking forward to seeing you at our upcoming events!
Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor. Your experience and guidance will be a great addition. Welcome aboard!
